case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. MARIE M MARA

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT MARA, MARIE M JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMORANDUM OF P/A IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HUNT, MICHAEL SCOTT SUBSTITUTED FOR BEYER, CHRISTOPHER AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JUL-25-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT MARA, MARIE M
NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1304(C) FILED BY PETITIONER'S ATTORNEY.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, NA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MARA, MARIE M $3,523.88 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,743.88, SEE SCANNED DOC
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-24-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Text Ruling
